apiDocs.title: BioCycle Peptides API
apiDocs.subtitle: Integrate with our platform using a simple REST API. Access products, orders, invoices, customers, and more.
apiDocs.authDescription: All API requests require a valid API key sent via the Authorization header. API keys can be generated from the admin dashboard.
apiDocs.authNoteText: Keep your API keys secure. Do not share them in public repositories, client-side code, or insecure channels.
apiDocs.rateLimitDescription: Each API key has a configurable rate limit (default: 1,000 requests/hour). Rate limit information is included in response headers.
apiDocs.rateLimitReset: Seconds until the rate limit resets
apiDocs.retryAfter: Seconds to wait before retrying (only on 429)
apiDocs.responseFormatDescription: All responses follow a consistent JSON format with success status, data payload, and optional pagination metadata.
apiDocs.permissionsDescription: Each API key is assigned specific permissions. Requests to endpoints outside the key's scope will return 403 Forbidden.
apiDocs.webhookVerificationDesc: Verify that webhook payloads are authentic by computing HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body with your webhook secret.

endpoints.listProducts: Retrieve a paginated list of active products. Supports filtering by category, search, and sorting.

endpoints.listOrders: Retrieve a paginated list of orders. Filter by status, payment status, user, and date range.
endpoints.createOrder: Create a new order with line items. Products are validated for availability and pricing is computed server-side.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Technique
pomodoro.desc: Work in 25-minute sessions with 5-minute breaks. After 4 sessions, take a 15-30 minute break. This method maintains focus and prevents mental fatigue.
pomodoro.aurelia: Activate the built-in timer in your dashboard. Aurelia automatically adjusts content to your session length.

activeRecall.title: Active Recall
activeRecall.desc: Instead of passively rereading, test yourself by trying to recall information from memory. This method strengthens neural connections and improves long-term retention.
activeRecall.aurelia: Use Aurelia's quizzes and flashcards. She generates personalized questions based on your weak points.

spacedRepetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spacedRepetition.desc: Review material at increasing intervals: 1 day, 3 days, 7 days, 14 days. This exploits the spacing effect to embed information in long-term memory.
spacedRepetition.aurelia: Aurelia's review queue uses the FSRS algorithm to automatically schedule your reviews at the optimal time.

feynman.title: Feynman Technique
feynman.desc: Explain a concept in your own words, as if teaching it to a beginner. If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
feynman.aurelia: Dictate your explanations to Aurelia. She will evaluate your understanding and correct any inaccuracies.

mindMapping.title: Mind Mapping
mindMapping.desc: Create visual diagrams that connect concepts to each other. This method helps see relationships and the overall structure of a complex subject.
mindMapping.aurelia: View Aurelia's concept map to visualize the links between notions in each course.

resources.examPrepTitle: How to Prepare for the AMF Exam
resources.examPrepSubtitle: Step-by-step guide to passing your insurance certification exam.

step1.title: Assess your current level
step1.desc: Start with the diagnostic quiz to identify your strengths and weaknesses. This will help you focus your efforts where they're needed most.

step2.title: Create a study plan
step2.desc: Plan 6 to 8 weeks of preparation. Distribute topics over the period and schedule regular reviews.

step3.title: Master the theory
step3.desc: Complete the online courses while taking notes. Use the Feynman Technique to verify your understanding of each concept.

step4.title: Practice with quizzes
step4.desc: Take quizzes regularly. Target concepts where your mastery is weakest. Aim for at least 80% before moving to the next topic.

step5.title: Simulate the exam
step5.desc: Use role-play simulations to test your knowledge in real-world situations. Practice time management.

step6.title: Final review
step6.desc: In the last week, focus on cheat sheets and spaced repetition. Don't overload — confidence comes from preparation.

resources.timeSubtitle: Practical tips to fit learning into your busy schedule.

tip1.title: Block fixed time slots
tip1.desc: Reserve 30 minutes per day in your calendar. Treat this time like a client meeting — non-negotiable.

tip2.title: Use downtime wisely
tip2.desc: Listen to audio lessons during your commute or review flashcards while waiting for a client.

tip3.title: Follow the 80/20 principle
tip3.desc: Focus on the 20% of concepts that cover 80% of the exam. The diagnostic quiz identifies these concepts for you.

tip4.title: Study as a team
tip4.desc: Form a study group with colleagues. Explaining concepts to others is the best way to learn.

tip5.title: Celebrate progress
tip5.desc: Track your badges and study streak. Small victories maintain motivation over the long term.

resources.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the platform.

whatIsAptitudes.a: Aptitudes is an online continuing education platform for insurance professionals in Quebec. It offers courses, quizzes, simulations, and an AI tutor (Aurelia) to help you earn and maintain your CEUs.

howCourseWorks.a: Each course is divided into chapters and lessons. You progress at your own pace, with quizzes at the end of each section. Aurelia adapts to your level and offers personalized reviews.

mobileAccess.q: Can I study on my phone?
mobileAccess.a: Yes! The platform is fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices. All features are accessible on phone and tablet.

ufcCredits.a: Yes, accredited courses provide continuing education units (CEUs) recognized by the AMF and the Chambre de la securite financiere. The number of CEUs is indicated on each course.

examPrep.q: Does the platform prepare for the AMF exam?
examPrep.a: Yes. Our courses cover AMF exam topics. The diagnostic quiz identifies your gaps and Aurelia creates a personalized path to maximize your chances of success.

aureliaHelp.q: What is Aurelia and how does she help me?
aureliaHelp.a: Aurelia is your personal AI tutor. She answers your questions, generates adapted quizzes, schedules your reviews with spaced repetition, and simulates client situations for practice.

resetProgress.a: Yes, you can reset your progress on any course from your dashboard. Your notes and badges are preserved.

certificate.q: How do I get my certificate?
certificate.a: A completion certificate is automatically generated when you finish all lessons and pass the final quiz with a sufficient score. You can download it as PDF or share it on LinkedIn.

teamAccess.q: Can my company enroll the whole team?
teamAccess.a: Yes, we offer volume licenses for firms and companies. Contact us for group pricing and admin dashboard access.

offlineAccess.a: Currently, an internet connection is required. However, flashcards and notes are cached locally for quick access even on slow connections.

refund.title: Refund & Return Policy
refund.subtitle: Your satisfaction is our priority. Learn about our fair and transparent policies.
refund.policyOverviewText: Due to the sensitive nature of research peptides and strict quality control requirements, we have specific guidelines for returns and refunds. Please read this policy carefully before placing your order.
refund.qualityGuaranteeText: We stand behind the quality of our products. Every peptide is:
refund.qualityList3: Accompanied by a Certificate of Analysis (COA)
refund.qualityList4: Shipped in proper conditions to maintain integrity
refund.qualityGuaranteeNote: If any product does not meet our quality standards, we will replace it free of charge or provide a full refund.
refund.acceptList1: • Unopened, sealed products within 30 days of delivery
refund.acceptList3: • Products that do not match the description/COA
refund.cannotList2: • Products stored improperly by the customer
refund.cannotList5: • International orders refused at customs (customer responsibility)
refund.step2Text: Our team will review your request within 1-2 business days and respond with instructions.
refund.step3Text: For unopened product returns, we will provide a return shipping label. Ship items in their original packaging.
refund.step4Text: Once we receive and inspect the return, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.
refund.timesVary: Times may vary depending on your bank or financial institution.
refund.damagedDefectiveText: If you receive a damaged or defective product:
refund.damagedList1: Do NOT use or open the product
refund.damagedList2: Take clear photos of the damage (packaging and product)
refund.damagedList3: Contact us within 48 hours of delivery
refund.damagedList4: We will send a replacement immediately at no cost
refund.damagedNoteText: You do not need to return damaged products in most cases. We trust our customers and prioritize quick resolution.
refund.cancelWithin1hText: Orders can be cancelled with a full refund.
refund.cancelAfter1hText: Orders may have already entered processing and cannot be cancelled. Contact us to check status.
refund.cancelAfterShippingText: Orders cannot be cancelled once shipped. You may refuse delivery or request a return once received.
refund.exchangesText: We do not offer direct exchanges. If you need a different product:
refund.exchangeList2: Place a new order for the desired product

customs.item1: Customers are responsible for any customs duties, import taxes, or fees imposed by their country.

customs.item3: Peptide Plus+ is not responsible for delays caused by customs clearance.
customs.item4: If an order is refused or returned due to customs issues, the customer is responsible for return shipping costs.

lostDamaged.title: Lost or Damaged Packages
lostDamaged.intro: All shipments are fully insured. If your package is:
lostDamaged.item1: Lost: Contact us after the estimated delivery date has passed. We will file a claim and either reship your order or provide a full refund.
lostDamaged.item2: Damaged: Take photos of the damage (outer packaging and products) and contact us within 48 hours. We will replace the items at no cost.
lostDamaged.item3: Compromised: If vials appear opened, contaminated, or otherwise compromised, do not use them. Contact us immediately for a replacement.

protocols.templateAntiAgingDesc: GHK-Cu + Epithalon protocol for cellular regeneration
protocols.templateAntiAgingInstructions:
**Epithalon (10-20 day cycles):**
- 5-10mg/day SC injection
- 4-6 month break between cycles

**GHK-Cu:**
- Topical: 2x/day on target areas
- Injectable: 1-2mg/day

**NAD+:**
- 250-500mg sublingual or IV

**Tips:**
- Combine with intermittent fasting
- Antioxidants and optimal sleep
protocols.templateCognitiveDesc: Nootropic protocol with Semax and Selank
protocols.templateCognitiveInstructions:
**Semax:**
- 200-600mcg/day intranasal
- Divide into 2-3 doses

**Selank:**
- 250-500mcg/day intranasal
- For anxiety and focus

**Dihexa:**
- 10-20mg/day oral
- Powerful neuroplasticity effect

**Tips:**
- Use in the morning to avoid insomnia
- Combine with cognitive exercise
- Stack with choline/omega-3
protocols.templateMuscleGrowthDesc: GHRP-6 + CJC-1295 protocol for muscle mass
protocols.templateMuscleGrowthInstructions:
**CJC-1295 DAC:**
- 2mg 1-2x/week

**Ipamorelin:**
- 200-300mcg 2-3x/day
- Upon waking, post-workout, before bed

**GHRP-6:**
- 100-200mcg 2-3x/day
- Fasted for best efficacy

**Tips:**
- Resistance training 4-5x/week
- Protein 2g/kg body weight
- Sleep 7-9h/night essential
protocols.templateRecoveryDesc: BPC-157 + TB-500 protocol for muscle and joint recovery
protocols.templateRecoveryInstructions:
**Week 1-4:**
- BPC-157: 250-500mcg/day (divided in 2 doses)
- TB-500: 2mg 2x/week

**Week 5-8:**
- BPC-157: 250mcg/day
- TB-500: 2mg 1x/week

**Tips:**
- Inject close to the treatment area
- Maintain a protein-rich diet
- Avoid anti-inflammatory drugs
protocols.templateWeightLossInstructions:
**Progressive titration (Semaglutide):**
- Week 1-4: 0.25mg/week
- Week 5-8: 0.5mg/week
- Week 9-12: 1mg/week
- Week 13+: 1.7-2.4mg/week if tolerated

**Tips:**
- Always inject on the same day
- Eat slowly, small portions
- Important hydration (2L+/day)
- Prioritize protein at each meal

about.heroDescription: Your trusted Canadian source for high-purity research peptides. Quality, integrity and scientific excellence since our founding.
about.historyP1: BioCycle Peptides was born from a passion for scientific research and the realization that Canada lacked a reliable supplier of high-quality research peptides at accessible prices.
about.historyP2: Founded in Montreal, our company set out to provide Canadian and international researchers with synthetic compounds of the highest purity, accompanied by detailed certificates of analysis for each batch.
about.historyP3: Today, we are proud to serve thousands of researchers around the world, from universities to private laboratories, and research institutions.
about.labTestsDescription: Every batch is analyzed by accredited independent laboratories. HPLC and mass spectrometry to guarantee purity and identity.
about.coaDescription: Detailed COA provided with every product. Complete traceability from manufacturing batch to delivery.
about.coldChainDescription: Shipped with cold packs. Controlled storage to preserve peptide integrity.
about.complianceDescription: Compliance with cGMP standards. Complete documentation for your research compliance.
about.ctaDescription: Explore our catalog of high-quality research peptides and supplements.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Democratizing access to high-quality research peptides
mission.whyText1: Scientific research is advancing rapidly, and peptides play a crucial role in many discoveries. Yet, accessing research-grade compounds remains a challenge for many researchers.
mission.whyText2: BioCycle Peptides was founded with a clear mission: to provide researchers worldwide with the highest purity synthetic peptides, complete documentation, and accessible pricing.
mission.obj1Desc: Maintain the highest purity standards (99%+) and provide complete analytical documentation for every product.
mission.obj2Desc: Make research peptides accessible to all researchers, from major institutions to independent laboratories.
mission.obj3Desc: Support our clients with educational resources, reconstitution guides, and responsive technical support.
mission.obj4Desc: Constantly expand our catalog to meet the emerging needs of the scientific community.
mission.disclaimerText: All our products are intended exclusively for scientific research and must not be used for human or animal consumption. We are committed to promoting responsible and ethical use of our products.

history.title: Our Story
history.subtitle: From idea to reality: the journey of BioCycle Peptides
history.year2023Desc: Faced with the lack of reliable Canadian peptide research suppliers, the idea for BioCycle Peptides emerged in Montreal. The goal: create a local source of high-quality compounds for Canadian researchers.
history.year2024Desc: Official launch of BioCycle Peptides with an initial range of 50 peptides. Partnership with accredited analytical laboratories to guarantee the quality of every batch.
history.year2025Desc: Expansion to over 200 products including peptides, research supplements, and accessories. Implementation of a loyalty program to reward our regular customers.
history.year2026Desc: Over 500 products available and thousands of researchers served worldwide. Launch of educational resources and the BioCycle community for knowledge sharing.
history.futureText: We continue to innovate to offer the best products and services to the scientific community. New peptides, new educational resources, and always more quality at every step.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every one of our actions
values.scientificRigorDesc: Every product undergoes rigorous testing by independent third-party laboratories. We make no compromises on the quality and purity of our peptides.
values.integrityDesc: Total transparency on our products, methods, and certifications. We provide complete documentation for every batch produced.
values.innovationDesc: We stay at the forefront of research to offer the latest peptides and compounds demanded by the scientific community.
values.responsibilityDesc: Commitment to ethical use of our products. We actively promote responsible research and regulatory compliance.
values.serviceDesc: Fast delivery, secure packaging, and responsive customer support. Your satisfaction and research success are our priority.
values.educationDesc: We share our knowledge through guides, detailed FAQs, and resources to help our clients use our products optimally.
values.quoteText: Quality is never an accident; it is always the result of intelligent effort.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A passionate team dedicated to scientific research
team.introText: At BioCycle Peptides, we are a diverse team of scientists, logistics specialists, and customer service enthusiasts. United by our commitment to quality and excellence, we work every day to support the scientific community.
team.scientificDesc: Our experts in biochemistry and pharmacology oversee product selection, verify certificates of analysis, and ensure every peptide meets our quality standards.
team.logisticsDesc: Cold chain and secure packaging specialists, they guarantee your products arrive in perfect condition with optimal storage conditions.
team.supportDesc: Available to answer your questions, our support team assists you from ordering to delivery and beyond.
team.techDesc: Our developers and designers work continuously to improve your platform experience and develop new features.
team.joinText: We are always looking for talented people passionate about science and customer service. Check out our job openings or send us a spontaneous application.
